steps.title: Use the quoted chapter line
steps.content: The student wants to provide a quotation from chapter 17. The notes identify the exact quoted sentence from that chapter, so the answer must include that quotation.

steps.title: Keep chapter context
steps.content: The sentence quoting The poethics of nostalgia combines estrangement and human solidarity, affect and reflection and linking it to skeptics' takes matches the notes. Choice B summarizes the book, Choice C discusses chapter 9, and Choice D gives chapter order but no quotation. The answer is A.
